title: sticherus retroflexus
intro: Sticherus retroflexus, also known as the flexible club moss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sticherus retroflexus include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
